links.name: MapleStory KMS Official
links.description: Official Korean MapleStory website by Nexon Korea with news, updates, patch notes, and event information.

links.name: MapleStory GMS Official
links.description: Official Global MapleStory website by Nexon America with game downloads, news, and community features.

links.name: Nexon Korea
links.description: Nexon Korea corporate site and game portal, the developer and publisher of MapleStory.

links.name: MapleStory Testpia (Test Server)
links.description: KMS test server information page where upcoming patches and balance changes are previewed.

links.name: Inven MapleStory
links.description: Korea's largest MapleStory community with guides, forums, patch analysis, and DPM rankings.

links.name: MapleStory Subreddit
links.description: Active English-speaking MapleStory community on Reddit with discussions, memes, guides, and Q&A.

links.name: MapleStory Discord (GMS)
links.description: Official GMS Discord server for real-time chat, party finding, and community events.

links.name: DCInside MapleStory Gallery
links.description: Korean community gallery for MapleStory discussions, memes, tips, and player interactions.

links.name: MapleStory Inven DPM Chart
links.description: Community-maintained DPM (Damage Per Minute) rankings comparing all MapleStory classes.

links.name: MapleStory.io
links.description: Comprehensive database with item sprites, character simulators, map viewers, and extracted game data.

links.name: MapleStory Fandom Wiki
links.description: Collaborative English wiki covering all MapleStory content including classes, items, quests, and lore.

links.name: Namu Wiki - MapleStory
links.description: Detailed Korean wiki with exhaustive information on MapleStory classes, systems, history, and meta analysis.

links.name: Maple Wiki (Global)
links.description: A curated MapleStory wiki with skill tables, equipment databases, and progression guides.

links.name: SuckHard's MapleStory Library
links.description: GMS-focused resource with detailed class overviews, skill breakdowns, and content guides.

links.name: MapleStory DPM Chart (Inven)
links.description: Up-to-date DPM chart maintained by the Korean community, ranking all classes by theoretical damage output.

links.name: Maple Calculator (BrandonMP)
links.description: Star Force enhancement cost calculator that estimates meso costs and expected attempts for target star levels.

links.name: MapleStory Handbook
links.description: Comprehensive tool with flame score calculators, inner ability simulators, and gear comparison features.

links.name: Arcane Symbol Calculator
links.description: Calculator for estimating Arcane and Sacred Symbol completion dates based on current progress and daily sources.

links.name: MapleStory Boss Crystal Calculator
links.description: Tool for calculating weekly meso income from boss crystal drops across all your characters.

links.name: MapleStory Official YouTube
links.description: Official MapleStory YouTube channel with trailers, update previews, and event announcements.

links.name: MapleStory OST Collection
links.description: Curated playlist of MapleStory background music spanning all regions from Victoria Island to Grandis.

links.name: Nexon Korea YouTube
links.description: Nexon Korea official channel with MapleStory winter/summer showcase events and developer talks.

links.name: IslingGunz (KMS Content Creator)
links.description: Popular English-language content creator covering KMS updates, class reviews, and patch previews.

links.name: Grandis Library - Training Guide
links.description: Comprehensive level-by-level training map guide from Lv.1 to Lv.300 with recommended areas for each range.

links.name: Grandis Library - Boss Guides
links.description: Detailed boss mechanic guides covering all major bosses from Zakum to The Black Mage and beyond.

links.name: MapleStory New Player Guide (Reddit)
links.description: Community-curated new player guide covering progression, gear optimization, and class selection advice.

links.name: Inven Skill Build Guides
links.description: Korean community skill build database with recommended skill point allocations and HEXA skill priorities.

links.name: Coppersan's Progression Guide
links.description: Widely-referenced GMS progression guide covering gear upgrades, funding, and milestone targets from early to endgame.
